summary: The AI agent failed to effectively handle the patient's vague request and did not successfully schedule the follow-up appointment for the knee injury, leading to a disconnection without resolution.

issues.title: Failure to Schedule Appointment
issues.details: The agent disconnected the call without scheduling the follow-up appointment for the patient's knee injury, despite the patient clearly stating their need for a follow-up.
issues.expected: The agent should have continued the conversation to schedule the appointment after the patient clarified their request.

issues.title: Inadequate Handling of Unclear Request
issues.details: The agent did not effectively clarify the patient's vague request initially and failed to guide the patient towards providing specific information about their knee injury.
issues.expected: The agent should have asked clarifying questions to better understand the patient's needs before attempting to schedule an appointment.

issues.title: Disconnection Without Confirmation
issues.details: The agent abruptly disconnected the call without confirming whether the patient's needs were met or providing any follow-up options.
issues.expected: The agent should have confirmed the patient's request and ensured they were connected to the appropriate service before ending the call.
